evals.name: english-with-chapters-bare-url-paste
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers on bare URL. Produces Learn/10-Raw/youtube/google-cloud-tech-njWyDHKYeVA.md with frontmatter (language: en, is_auto_caption: false, is_translation: false, has_chapters: true, chapter_count: 6, status: raw), and body with # Chapters, # Description, # Transcript. The transcript is the manual track, not auto.

evals.name: chinese-manual-only-conversational
evals.prompt: Hey can you fetch the transcript and metadata for this video and add it to my learning raw folder? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2pM-7fBXc_M I want to read it later and run summarization on it
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. Produces Learn/10-Raw/youtube/papaya-2pM-7fBXc_M.md (or similar channel-slug) with frontmatter language: zh-TW or zh-Hans, is_auto_caption: false, is_translation: false. Crucially the language picked is one of the manual tracks (zh-Hans, zh-TW), NOT a phantom auto-caption — `make_raw.py` Tier 3 should win. Skill stops after writing the raw file; does not attempt segmentation or update inbox.md.

evals.name: transcripts-disabled-graceful-halt
evals.prompt: process this for the inbox please https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F9WrUwcbGPM
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers. yt-dlp metadata fetch succeeds. make_raw.py exits 2 (TranscriptsDisabled). Skill reports the failure to the user explicitly: video has no transcript available, Whisper STT fallback is not yet implemented, suggests skipping or revisiting later. Does NOT invent a transcript. Does NOT write any file under Learn/10-Raw/youtube/. Does NOT update inbox.md.

evals.name: should-not-trigger-bilibili
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger. The description explicitly scopes to youtube.com / youtu.be only. Bilibili extraction is out of scope. If Claude tries to invoke this skill anyway, the SKILL.md's failure-mode table should redirect it to halt and tell the user this skill is YouTube-only.
